violations: ## Concrete Example 2 does not specify at least one concrete pass/fail threshold for the regression signal (e.g., which metric drops by how much, or which smoke test name fails).
## Concrete Example 2 does not specify a concrete SLO for containment (e.g., target time-to-rollback), even though ## Trade-offs lists it as a governance effectiveness metric.
## System Breakdown includes a reference to adding a run id in a commit trailer, but does not state the exact required field name or format (making enforcement less checkable).
## System Breakdown (Audit) uses a regex-like format (`run_[a-z0-9]{12}`) without stating whether the check is case-sensitive, which can lead to inconsistent enforcement.

## Concrete Example 2 detection threshold uses two alternative conditions (5xx rate, p95 latency) but does not state whether both are evaluated simultaneously or if either one failing is sufficient (ambiguity for a check).
## Thesis contains a 30-word sentence ("The “operating envelope” is the set of actions...") exceeding the style-guard max_words limit of 28.
